user.title: Home Keeper — Battery Notes
user.description: Create a Home Keeper task when a Battery Notes battery goes low, and clear it (recording the replacement) when the battery is replaced. Requires both Home Keeper and Battery Notes.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is needed.

data.two_way: Two-way sync (completing in Home Keeper marks the battery replaced)
data.clear_on_recovery: Clear the task when the battery level recovers on its own
data.treat_not_reported: Also flag batteries that stop reporting (often dead)
data.not_reported_days: Days with no report before flagging a battery

data_description.name_template: Use {device_name} for the battery's device. Default: "Replace battery: {device_name}".
data_description.treat_not_reported: A dead battery usually stops reporting instead of going low. When on, a battery that hasn't reported for the number of days below gets a replacement task. The day threshold also filters brief dropouts (restarts, network blips).
data_description.not_reported_days: Only applies when the option above is on.
